name: Fathom

composio_registry_match.name: Fathom
composio_registry_match.description: AI meeting assistant that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings

description: AI-powered meeting intelligence platform that records, transcribes, summarizes, and syncs meeting insights to CRM and productivity tools.
notes: Composio integration confirms the existence of a public API and OAuth2 support; Fathom's product model is heavily driven by API-based integrations with Slack, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Notion.
